content:
This yields both **placement** (attic, living room, basement, etc.) and **filters**: other *universal, recursive, cross-cultural lenses* through which to study and build yourself.

---

## 🏛️ PART I: HUMAN DESIGN SYSTEM PLACEMENT

**In the House of the Body–Soul Architecture**

| System Component | Location in House | Why |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Attic (Higher Mind)** | Pluto, Neptune, North Node, Uranus | Cosmic blueprint, transpersonal truth, spiritual mutation |
| **Living Room (Social Self)** | Personality Sun, Mercury, Venus, Earth | Interface with others, where you speak, attract, ground |
| **Kitchen (Creative Fire)** | Manifesting Generator Type, Sacral response, Emotional wave | Engine of energy, digestion, and creation |
| **Bedroom (Inner Life)** | Moon, Design Venus, Hermit (2-line), Emotional Authority | Where you restore, dream, integrate |
| **Basement (Shadow + Foundation)** | South Node, Saturn, Mars, Design Moon, Gate 61.2 (Pluto) | Deep learning, karma, drive, ancestral pattern |
| **Stairwell / Halls (Transit Points)** | Profile 3/2, Incarnation Cross | Carries energy between floors—spiritual scaffolding |
